scene.context: The team is discussing the upcoming sprint's deadline for the new feature, which was misunderstood by the product manager, causing a minor panic among team members.

antagonist_opening_line: Maya, I just got an email from the CTO saying that our deadline for the feature is actually 2 weeks earlier than what I told you. Can you explain why the database integration is taking so long?

strategy_chips.label: Own It Head-On
strategy_chips.philosophy: Taking full accountability disarms criticism and redirects the conversation to solutions. People respect those who don't make excuses.

strategy_chips.label: Redirect to Root Cause
strategy_chips.philosophy: The visible failure often has a systemic cause. Surfacing it shows strategic thinking and prevents the same issue from recurring.

strategy_chips.label: Propose a Recovery Plan
strategy_chips.philosophy: People care less about what went wrong and more about what happens next. A concrete plan demonstrates competence under pressure.

success_criteria: The team understands the new deadline and its implications
The product manager and senior engineer agree on a revised plan
The team leader is satisfied with the resolution
transfer_targets: Delivering bad news to a stakeholder without losing their trust
Clarifying a misunderstood deadline with a team member
Proposing a recovery plan to mitigate the consequences of a missed deadline
